title: Eclipse-revamped
description:
Built for performance, designed for the win. Eclipse-revamped:-
 Features clean, low-profile textures, shortened swords for better visibility, and optimized 16x blocks to keep your FPS high during intense bed defenses. Zero clutter—just pure gameplay.
body:
🌑 ECLIPSE 16x | BedWars & PvP ⚔️
Eclipse is a high-performance, dark-themed texture pack designed specifically for BedWars and competitive PvP. It strips away the lag and visual clutter of default Minecraft, leaving you with a sharp, clean, and modern aesthetic.
**GENTLE REMINDER**
USE SKYBOXIFY MOD FOR SKY OVERLAY 

✨ Key Features:
Optimized 16x Textures: Maximum FPS for those intense 4v4v4v4 end-games.

Competitive Sword Models: Shortened blades for better screen visibility during combos.

Clear Combat Visuals: Low fire, translucent GUI, and outlined ores so you never miss a resource.

Eclipse Wool & Blocks: High-contrast wool colors to make speed-bridging and clutching easier.

Custom Skybox: A breathtaking dark lunar eclipse sky that stays easy on the eyes during long sessions.

🛠️ Technical Details:
Resolution: 16x16

### # ## ### Version: Supports 1.21+ (Optimized for BedWars)

Category: PvP / FPS Boost / Minimalist

"When the sun goes down, the grind begins. Outshine the competition with Eclipse."
